Executive Summary

Revenue intelligence analysis detected 756 invoicing gaps (164 requiring immediate action, 573 for pre-invoice review, 19 low-confidence signals). Overbilling exposure: 522 gaps ($60,373 quantified). Missed revenue signals: 58 gaps. Contract rate deviations: 31 gaps. Top issue types: over_logging (378), unauthorized_entry (121), over_billing_on_leave_or_holiday (119). Resolve HIGH gaps before issuing the next client invoice.

Invoicing Gaps by Project

Quantified overbilling and missed revenue per project. Dollar figures sourced from billing records where rate data is available; excess hours are a proxy for unquantified exposure. Missing Days = Slack-active days with no timesheet. Rate Gaps = SOW contract rate deviations. Projects with no financial signals excluded.
